sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime, value String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, now(), 'event1'), (2, now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, 'event2'), (3, NULL, 'event3');
SELECT id, toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time) AS formatted_time FROM test_dates WHERE formatted_time <= toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(now());
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_dates WHERE toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time) <= toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(NOW() - INTERVAL 2 DAY);

SELECT AVG(toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time)) FROM (SELECT event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time) HAVING toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(event_time) <= 20230315000000;
CREATE TABLE test_numeric (num1 UInt64, num2 UInt64);
SELECT num1, toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(toDateTime(toUnixTimestamp(num1))) AS converted_num FROM test_numeric HAVING converted_num <= toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(now());
CREATE TABLE test_joins (id UInt32, ref_id UInt32, value String);
SELECT t1.id, toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(t2.event_time) FROM test_dates AS t1 JOIN test_joins AS t2 ON t1.id <= t2.ref_id WHERE t2.value = 'join1';
SELECT t1.id, COUNT(*) FROM test_dates AS t1 JOIN test_joins AS t2 ON toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(t1.event_time) <= toYYYYMMDDhhmmss(now()) GROUP BY t1.id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
